name: matt-workflow
description: A guided software-delivery workflow built from Matt Pocock's skills and Superpowers worktree discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Guided design, tickets, TDD, review, and delivery
interface.longDescription: Routes work through focused grilling, specifications, tracer-bullet tickets, fresh implementation agents, TDD, code review, and safe Git worktrees. Experimental branches cover batch interviews, questionnaires, setup wizards, and recurring workflows.
defaultPrompt: Route this feature from idea to implementation.
Help me plan this large, foggy project.
Turn this recurring process into a workflow.
